events.title: Japan ramping up defence is 'critical' to prevent war, Defence Minister Koizumi tells BBC

events.title: Trump aims to end Iran war but nuclear issue remains unresolved

events.title: What's in the US-Iran agreement?

events.title: US-Iran deal leaves core sticking points unresolved - and a $300bn question

events.title: US and Iranian presidents sign deal aiming to end war

events.title: Russian artist and Putin critic shot dead in Poland

events.title: Video: Hundreds of drones target Russia in major Ukrainian attack

events.title: Bowen: Iran deal ends Trump's war that revealed limit of US dominance
